summary: A local TV news segment ('DIGGING DEEPER / FRAUD IN MINNESOTA / TARGETED REVIEW') with an anchor reporting on a Department of Labor review of alleged unemployment-insurance fraud in Minnesota, including a full-screen quote card from Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer. It is a news broadcast.
notable_text: REVIEW OF POTENTIAL FRAUD IN MINNESOTA'S UI PROGRAM
LORI CHAVEZ-DEREMER, U.S. DEPT. OF LABOR SECRETARY
